title: V2.5 Governance Compression

sources.reason: Defines V2.5 as Governance Compression after V2 is stable.
Confirms V2 intent-aware development is already complete.
Provides the proposed V2.5 architecture, phases, and conservative recommendation model.
Defines Intent, Intent Alignment, and Repository Governance Layer terms.
States that Summary is repository truth and Cockpit should only compress existing evidence.
Documents generated status expectations and lifecycle checks.
Defines optional Contract and Summary fields, including intent and intentAlignment.
Reinforces intent-first, evidence-driven summary writing and optional intent alignment.

riskAssessment.reason: Multiple status entrypoints must be updated without inventing new information or breaking no-active behavior.

executionDecision.reason: V2.5 derivation and status integration are fully specified and ready to implement.

preReviewWarnings: Verify Cockpit does not invent information that is absent from Contract, Summary, or check evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Cockpit status derives recommendation-oriented governance signals from Contract, Summary, and check evidence.
The derivation layer is pure and testable without file I/O.
Status generation and status checking consume the new governance model.
Legacy Summary and archive records remain readable.
guidelines: Cockpit must only compress existing evidence and must not invent missing facts.
Keep derivation conservative when evidence is missing.

intent.problem: Cockpit still reports a fact list and a generic ready_for_review state. V2.5 needs to compress repository truth into a human decision state without copying Summary verbatim.
constraints: Summary remains the repository truth source.
Cockpit must derive only from Contract, Summary, and check evidence.
No LLM or project-specific hardcoding in the generic derivation layer.
Do not implement V3 or V4.
intent.rationale: A pure derivation layer gives a conservative, explainable bridge from repository truth to human decision state while preserving compatibility.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Coverage policy mapping for scripts/ai_check_status.py must stay aligned with existing status tests.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
